case_title: SALVADORE CORTERA VS. CHAO X CHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-07-2016 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-13-2017 - NOT HELD AND REMOVED/DISMISSAL ON FILE. (0.0)

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-29-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-19-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
